description: Orthogonal to Stahl archetype — portfolio sleeves for dashboard sort/filter by sector. Source of truth for ticker membership; synced into classification.investment_sleeve via sync_investment_sleeves.py.

exchanges_markets.label: Exchanges & market infrastructure
exchanges_markets.description: Stock exchanges, trading venues, index/ratings croupiers, and market-data toll collectors

technology_ai.label: Technology & AI
technology_ai.description: Hyperscalers, semiconductors, AI infrastructure, cloud, and digital-asset treasury platforms

software_platforms.label: Software & platforms
software_platforms.description: SaaS, marketplaces, serial acquirers, and fintech/investment platforms

real_assets_lt.label: Real assets · royalties
real_assets_lt.description: Long-duration royalty, mineral, oil & gas, and passive NPI trusts

real_assets_land.label: Real assets · land
real_assets_land.description: Land, surface, timber, water rights, and mineral-acreage optionality

holding_conglomerates.label: Holding companies & conglomerates
holding_conglomerates.description: Diversified holdcos, investment vehicles, and multi-asset platforms

cvr_contingent.label: CVRs
cvr_contingent.description: Pre-close deals with contingent cash/CVR kickers (opportunity funnel) and post-close contingent value rights already in the universe (claim inventory)

fund_nav_discounts.label: NAV discounts
fund_nav_discounts.description: Closed-end funds and listed investment companies where the edge is price vs reported or economic NAV (classic discount, shadow/zero-marked sleeves, or holdco look-through)

financial_services.label: Financial services
financial_services.description: Insurance brokers, litigation finance, life settlements, and asset managers

healthcare_pharma.label: Healthcare & pharma
healthcare_pharma.description: Life sciences, diagnostics, generics, and pharma royalty platforms

energy_infrastructure.label: Energy & infrastructure
energy_infrastructure.description: Utilities, water midstream, nuclear, and regulated infrastructure
